blockers: Uneekor EYE XO2 and Foresight Falcon (the two overhead units the tall-but-shallow section relies on) have no verified product image — sourced photos needed before they can become body visuals. They are correctly text + Amazon-search only for now.
notes: Verdict-first (min usable vs comfortable room). Room-fit master table (dimension -> what it unlocks) plus a ceiling-height table. 'The room decides the launch monitor' is the spine: shallow=side camera (SkyTrak+), deep=radar (R10), tall-but-shallow=overhead (EYE XO2 text-only) or side-of-tee (R50). Projector section is throw-math driven (throw distance = throw ratio x screen width; 8-14 ft mount window) with GT2100HDR for shallow / LK936ST for deep. 2 shotgrids (6 + 4 figures), 8 gearpick asides, tip/forum/warning callouts, dated Sources Checked with 7 real links.
